positive: A stylish, minimalist silhouette of a celestial raccoon wearing a tiny, flowing trench coat, perched on a crescent moon. The raccoon is gazing at a glowing nebula background filled with pastel blues, cosmic purples, and gold glitter specks. Composition should be centered, featuring high contrast black silhouettes against a dreamy gradient background. Style: Neo-Victorian celestial illustration, highly detailed vector art, glowing ethereal aesthetic, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Lighting: Backlit, dramatic, emphasizing the silhouette edges. Focus on clean lines and negative space. --ar 1:1
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, grainy, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, out of frame, noise, duplicate, poor composition
